role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on script identification (Bengali) and language distribution.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain (alluvial plain), vegetation (rice paddies), and climate.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified crop species (Oryza sativa) and general vegetation types.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Examined utility pole infrastructure and road construction standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural styles (brick/concrete) and infrastructure aesthetics.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country. All agents adhered to their domains, providing concrete evidence (script, rice paddies, pole types) that was visually grounded. The tournament successfully used the linguistic evidence to distinguish between the two most similar candidates (Bangladesh and India).

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified Bengali script on the sign.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described flat terrain and rice paddies.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described concrete poles and road condition.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly described brick and concrete building styles.
